title: fetch_session: validate upload_url and download_url non-empty
description:
Why: fetch_session validates api_url and event_source_url for emptiness but not upload_url or download_url. Blob operations will fail silently on empty URLs.

What: Add emptiness checks for upload_url and download_url in fetch_session(), returning ClientError::InvalidSession.

Algorithm:
1. In client.rs fetch_session(), after existing checks, add:
   if session.upload_url.is_empty() { return Err(ClientError::InvalidSession('upload_url is empty')) }
   if session.download_url.is_empty() { return Err(ClientError::InvalidSession('download_url is empty')) }
2. Add two unit tests (reuse existing test_session pattern, set empty upload_url/download_url)
3. Run cargo test
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; two new tests cover empty upload_url and download_url
